title: Event payload: tool_call (v0.1)
description: Payload shape for tool_call events. Records the agent's invocation of a tool. The outcome (success, error, denied, timeout, or other) is recorded in a subsequent tool_result event with a matching toolCallId.

toolCallId.description: Unique identifier for this specific tool invocation within the run. The corresponding tool_result event MUST carry this exact value.

runId.description: The run this tool call belongs to. MUST match the runId of the run_started for the surrounding run.

toolRef.description: toolId of the tool being invoked. SHOULD correspond to the toolId in a project.tool.registered event (in this Pack or resolvable elsewhere).

toolName.description: Human-readable display name for the tool. Convenience only — 'toolRef' is the canonical identifier.

input.description: Arguments passed to the tool. Open shape, any JSON type. Implementers SHOULD preserve the structured form (object) rather than serialising to a string. SHOULD be present unless the tool takes no input.
